data.content: Plan review requested revisions. Main gaps: agent-wizard.sh still needs additive dispatch and pool preservation, the shared settings reader and writer must round-trip provider, flavor, and version agent metadata from smol-toml output, and the large-list model-picker flow needs current-selection visibility plus duplicate-safe additive behavior. Expand the PTY tests to seed advanced pools and agent metadata, then rerun agent-wizard and setup to prove one targeted change leaves unrelated config untouched.
